goals: Calculate future value of an initial investment to understand compound growth
Generate a comparison table across multiple interest rates and time periods
Calculate present value of a target future amount to understand discounting

user_agent_config.personality: Analytical and curious, prefers structured data and comparisons to understand concepts. Asks precise questions to build mental models.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic financial concepts but is not a finance expert. Knows what compound interest and discounting mean conceptually but wants to quantify them. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has completed all three financial calculations and has the results needed for their analysis.
